summary: Stunning ambient capture with spaced omni mics that deliver crystal‑clear sound despite the unknown show details.
review: The lone reviewer gives this recording a perfect five‑star rating, focusing on the impressive microphone setup – apparently spaced omnidirectional Schoeps capsules – and the resulting vivid, spacious audio. While no musical performance is discussed (the concert date is unknown), the technical excellence of the capture is highlighted as the main attraction.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review (5 stars) praising the mic technique; rating reflects strong recording quality but limited data on performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the use of spaced omni microphones (Schoeps), yielding a wide, clear soundstage and detailed ambience; no reported issues with clarity or balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure; show date and setlist are unknown.
